# Freedom Credit Card
Most Rewarding card for your Everyday Spends
  * Up to 50 days of interest free period
  * 10X CashPoints on select merchants
  * Get additional 10% off on Swiggy Dineout


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online&icid=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online#nbb "Apply Now")
![Freedom Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/Freedom1?fmt=webp)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.

More benefits than ever before
Welcome Benefits
  * 500 Reward Points on fee realisation.  
(Applicable only on payment of Joining Membership Fee)


Exclusive Benefits
  * 10X CashPoints on your favourite merchants - Big Basket, BookMyshow, OYO, Swiggy & Uber


Milestone Benefits
  * Renewal membership fee waived off by spending ₹50,000 and above in an annual year


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 10X Reward Points on your favourite merchants- Big Basket, BookMyShow, OYO, Swiggy & Uber
  * 2 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent on other spends


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card "View More")
![Freedom Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * **Interest Free Credit Period:** Up to 50 days of interest free period from the date of purchase (subject to the submission of the charge by the Merchant)
  * **Contactless Payment:** Facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets
  * **Smart EMI:** an option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase. To know more [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi)
  * **Zero lost card liability:** In the unfortunate event of losing your HDFC Bank MoneyBack Plus Credit Card, on reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre (Toll free numbers 1800 1600/1800 2600. Customers traveling overseas can reach us at 022-61606160.
  * **Card Management:** Made simple via HDFC Bank [MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfc.bank.in/)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card "View More")
![Freedom Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### PayZapp Benefits
  * Link your HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card on PayZapp -
  * Earn Additional CashPoints along with the card CashPoints on Utility Bills, Mobile Recharges and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashPoints on Shopping in-app over 200 plus brands
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card "View More")
![Freedom Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Travel and Dining Benefits
  * 10X CashPoints on Swiggy, Oyo, Uber, etc.,
  * 10% additional discount on Swiggy Dineout using coupon code HDFCCARDS [TnC(opens in a new tab)](https://webviews.swiggy.com/portal-static-page/dineout-hdfc-tnc)
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India (on minimum transaction of ₹400 & maximum transaction of ₹5,000. Maximum waiver of ₹250 per statement cycle)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card "View More")
![Freedom Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Indian nationality.**
  * **Age****:** Min 21 yrs. & Max 60 Yrs.
  * **Income****:** Net Monthly Income> ₹12,000


Self-Employed
  * **Indian nationality.**
  * **Age:** Min 21 yrs. & Max 65 Yrs.
  * **Income:** ITR > ₹6.0 Lakhs per annum 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Save up to Rs. 4,000* annually just like 10 lakh + HDFC Bank Freedom Credit card holders 
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mcid=website_freedom_prodpg_stickyfooter&icid=website_organic_herobanner_freedomcreditcard:banner:applyonline#nbb "Apply Now")
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof 
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof 
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof 
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
Online application process:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Check Eligibility (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online&icid=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online#nbb "Check Eligibility")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCard
  2. ### Fee and Charges
  3. ### Redemption Value
  4. ### Contactless Payment
  5. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions
  6. ### Application Channels


#  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of Freedom HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


Single Interface
  * One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans


Spends tracking
  * Simple interface to track all your spends


Reward Points
  * View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fee and Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹500/- + Applicable Taxes
  * Spend over ₹50,000 in a year before renewal to get your Credit Card fee waived
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card/part-i-key-fact-statement-cum-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) to view details of HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card Fees and Charges


![Fees and Renewal](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Redemption Value 
  * Reward Points Redemption against each category can be redeemed at

  
| 1 Reward Point Equivalent to  |   |  
| --- | --- |  
| Product Catalogue  | Up to ₹0.15  |  
| Unified[ SmartBu(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/foryou)y Portal (on Flights/ Hotel Bookings)  | ₹0.15  |  
| CashBack  | ₹0.15  |  
| Airmiles  | 0.15 airmiles  |  
[_Click here_](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/simple-rewards-program) to know more on Rewards Catalogue
![Redemption Value](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Contactless Payment 
  * HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets. 


(Note: in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.)
![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.
  * For more details on the card benefits, [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card/freedom-tncs.pdf)


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online&icid=website_organic_freedom_CC_Cat_pg_apply_online#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply [log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/) to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/) and our staff will help you with the application.


![Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card is a versatile Credit Card offering for your everyday spends. It combines convenience, flexibility, and exclusive rewards. From a 1% fuel surcharge waiver to renewal benefits, this card is designed to enhance your lifestyle. 
###  How does the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card work? 
You can use the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card seamlessly. for various transactions, earning CashPoints on specific merchants and enjoying a lower interest rate for the first 90 days. The card works at a vast network of establishments, and you can convert significant purchases into easy EMIs. Leverage this Credit Card for your everyday spends and enjoy special rewards! 
###  Where is the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card accepted? 
The HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card is widely accepted at merchant locations, both online and offline. From your favourite grocery store to top-rated restaurants, the card ensures hassle-free transactions. Experience the convenience of cashless payments and avail of exclusive discounts at partner restaurants, via Swiggy Dineout. 
###  Can I withdraw cash from HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card? 
Yes, you can withdraw cash from using the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card. Enjoy the flexibility of accessing cash when needed, subject to certain limits at set interest rates. 
###  How secure is the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card? 
The HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card ensures robust security measures to safeguard your transactions. With advanced encryption technology, your financial data is protected against unauthorised access. Additionally, our zero lost card liability feature guarantees that you won't be held responsible for any fraudulent transactions when reported promptly to our 24-hour call centre. 
###  How to Apply for the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card? 
You can apply for the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card online by checking eligibility on the official website. You can submit the required documents, online or by visiting your nearest branch. Upon approval, get your new HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card delivered to your home address. 
###  What are the documents required to apply for a HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card? 
**To apply for the HDFC Bank Freedom Credit Card, you need the following documents:**
  * **Identity Proof  
**Passport   
Aadhaar Card   
Voter ID   
Driving licence   
PAN card   
Passport size photos 


  * **Address Proof  
**Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)   
Rental agreement   
Passport   
Aadhaar card   
Voter ID   



  * **Income Proof  
**Salary slips (for salaried individuals)   
Income Tax Returns (ITR)   
Form 16   
Bank statements
